title: Potion of Supreme Healing

markdown:
# Potion of Supreme Healing

- **Type**: P|XPHB
- **Weight**: 0.5 lb.

You regain 10d4 + 20 [[hit_points Points]] when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.
